name: Good Times Restaurants Inc.
business: Good Times Restaurants Inc. operates Bad Daddy's Burger Bar and Good Times Burgers & Frozen Custard restaurants. Bad Daddy's is a full-service casual dining burger bar, while Good Times is a quick-service drive-thru concept focusing on all-natural burgers, fries, and frozen custard. The company sells to consumers through dine-in, drive-thru, carry-out, and delivery.

exposures.sentence: Our Company Good Times Restaurants Inc., a Nevada corporation formed on October 6, 1996, operates Bad Daddy s Burger Bar restaurants ( Bad Daddy s ) and Good Times Burgers & Frozen Custard restaurants ( Good Times ).
The inability to recruit and retain these individuals may delay the planned openings of new restaurants or result in high employee turnover in existing restaurants, which could harm our business.
Security breaches of confidential customer information in connection with our electronic processing of credit and debit card transactions may adversely affect our business.
Macroeconomic conditions and inflation could affect our operating results.
Tariffs that are implemented or merely threatened may increase the cost of commodities we purchase for use in our restaurants.
Concerns relating to food safety, food-borne illness, pandemics and other diseases could reduce customer traffic to our restaurants.
